'''Canoliss IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Canoliss system/Legends|Canoliss system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Cannolite]] species.
